name: 男主浴室/臥室偶遇
description: 女主潛入男主家找實驗數據，意外撞見男主出浴。私密空間的偶遇製造曖昧張力，同時推進感情線和主線劇情。

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: Wow, I'm such a lucky girl! / You can easily bump into a handsome man emerging from the bath. / The mortal sisters are really tight-lipped. / If this ancestor doesn't descend to the mortal realm... / I had no idea you guys ate so well.
examples.context: 女主潛入男主家找實驗數據，意外撞見男主出浴。私密空間的偶遇製造曖昧張力，同時推進感情線和主線劇情。
